Description: Topsoil stripping and stockpiling — mechanical removal of topsoil from all driving surface areas and haulage to on-site stockpile
SourceSection: Attributes — Area of Work / Volume of Topsoil
Notes: Area TBD per SURVEY-001 and IFC drawings; 3500 m2 is parametric assumption (ASM-002). Rate per EC-04.

Description: Equipment mobilization and demobilization for earthworks stripping operations
Notes: Dozer/scraper/excavator mob-demob; type TBD per contractor means and methods.

Description: Pre-construction site assessment and condition documentation (walkover + photography + condition report)
SourceSection: Step 1 — Pre-Construction Site Assessment and Documentation
Notes: Includes site superintendent time and photographic documentation per D-010.

Description: Utility locate and ground disturbance authorization
Notes: Safety-critical precondition; includes Alberta One Call / Click Before You Dig and permit determination.

Description: Stripping limits survey staking and stockpile area layout
SourceSection: Step 3 — Establish Stripping Limits and Stockpile Area
Notes: Staking/marking of stripping extents from IFC drawings.

Description: Interim erosion and sediment control measures for exposed subgrade and stockpile
Notes: Silt fence / erosion blanket / temporary seeding — specific measures TBD per site conditions.

SourceSection: Step 6 — Site Cleanup and Completion Preparation
Notes: Dressing/compaction/cover of stockpile; method depends on storage duration (see Procedure Step 6 decision criteria).

SourceSection: Step 7 — Final Inspection and County Coordination
Notes: Joint inspection with County representative; formal inspection report.
